criteria: 
 o The individual is eligible for Medicare Part B coverage of home health services 
(the nursing visit to perform the injection may be the individual's qualifying 
service); 

o The individual sustained a bone fracture that a physician, or allowed practitioner, 
or certified nurse midwife certifies was related to post-menopausal osteoporosis; 
and 

o The individual's physician, or allowed practitioner, or certified nurse midwife 
certifies that she is unable to learn the skills
